negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Eligibility 'LCME-accredited or COCA-accredited medical schools only' implicitly excludes international medical schools.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) Rush UMC explicitly named as placement; (b) US LCME/COCA only; (c) VSLO required; (d) two programs (standard Visiting MS + Visiting Scholars); (e) cost + visa NOT_STATED.
plainEnglishSummary: Rush University Medical Center accepts visiting medical students through two Rush Medical College programs: Visiting Medical Students Program and Visiting Scholars Program. Both restrict eligibility to LCME-accredited or COCA-accredited medical schools — meaning international medical students are not eligible. Applications via VSLO. Cost and visa policies not stated on the hub.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because IL gained a second P101 packet (after UChicago); Rush UMC named explicitly as placement site.
